  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/evtviewer   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  evtViewer - A PERL-based viewer for Ms event (*.evt) log files.
  
  evtViewer displays Ms event (*.evt) log files in a human-readable format.
  
  WWW: http://contribs.martymac.com
  
  PR:             ports/103180
  Submitted by:   Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche(at)martymac.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.836     +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/sysutils/evtviewer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/evtviewer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/evtviewer/pkg-descr (new)
